visual_description: A man in a light-colored shirt stands on a balcony at night while a man in a dark suit grabs his shoulder. The man in the shirt raises his hand to his face and then places his other hand on his hip, appearing to respond to the suited man. The balcony overlooks a dimly lit residential area with windows and a railing.
audio_description: The audio features low, indistinct conversation between the two men, with occasional muffled speech.
